description_long: This is a two-story brick hardware store with a weathered, dark red-brown facade and a flat roof. The front features four large windows, two on each floor, with aged wooden frames and partially boarded or curtained glass, giving a rundown appearance. The ground floor has a recessed double-door entrance to the left, flanked by a large display window with faded signage above it. The side and rear walls are plain, each with additional windows, but no other entrances or decorative elements. The building's exterior shows signs of wear, such as chipped paint, grime, and minor graffiti, suggesting it is located in an older urban neighborhood. The overall structure is boxy and utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function over form.
description: A weathered, two-story brick hardware store with a flat roof, large front windows, and a faded storefront sign. The facade is aged and utilitarian, with visible wear and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display window, faded signage, and four prominent windows with aged frames.
description_view_1: Left side view with two upper and two lower windows, plain brickwork, and no visible entrance or signage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three upper and three lower windows, all with similar aged frames, and a plain brick wall.
description_view_3: Right side view with two upper and two lower windows, plain brickwork, and no visible entrance or signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: A faded, rectangular sign above the display window with partially legible text reading 'HARDWARE STORE' in block letters, white on a dark background.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a recessed double-door entrance on the left, a large display window to the right, and a faded sign above. Four upper windows are symmetrically arranged, with aged frames and partially boarded or curtained glass.
